para.see: Learn more about this API in the Elasticsearch documentation.

summary.para: Controls how unlabeled documents in the search results are counted. If set to true, unlabeled documents are ignored and neither count as relevant or irrelevant. Set to false (the default), they are treated as irrelevant.
Sets the maximum number of documents retrieved per query. This value will act in place of the usual size parameter in the query.
Sets the rating threshold above which documents are considered to be "relevant".
